subcodes.title: Words spoken privately in Washington D.C., 1912-04-23
subcodes.first_line: We must offer thanks to the Blessed Beauty because it is His help that has stirred the people; it is His grace that has changed the hearts.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک را باید شکر نمود زیرا تائیدات اوست که مهیج نفوس است توفیقات جمال ابهی است که مقلب قلوبست
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
